problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Bacteriophage surface display for targeting — specifically Bacteriophage surface display — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
